/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gpushare_client.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgpushare_client.so.1 -o libgpushare_client.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/gpushare_client.dir/client/gpushare_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpushare_client.dir/client/generated_stubs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpushare_client.dir/client/generated_all_stubs.cpp.o  -ldl -lpthread
